\tzpentry{ID5890}{Wavefunction Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5890 introduces Wavefunction Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\psi(r, t) = \psi_{\text{slow}}(r, t) + \psi_{\text{fast}}(r, t) + \psi_{\text{singular}}(r, t)$$
